overall.description: Video game footage of a character in a yellow leopard-print wingsuit gliding over a vast desert canyon landscape. The sequence begins with a parachute deployment, transitions through afternoon light, and progresses into deep blue hour as distant snow-capped mountains emerge on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial deployment zone over desert canyon

events.description: parachute detaches from character, transitioning to wingsuit free glide
camera tilts upward to silhouette character against bright sky before leveling out

agents.ego_description: character detaches from parachute and stabilizes into wingsuit glide over the canyon terrain below

entered.detail: red and blue parachute canopy with SANTA CRUZ text visible above the character
eroded desert canyon with layered sedimentary rock formations and steep cliffs
tall isolated rock spires and mesas scattered across the desert horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a parachute deployment over a vast desert canyon. The character detaches from the canopy and begins wingsuit flight, with the camera briefly tilting skyward to capture a silhouette against the bright afternoon sky before stabilizing into a forward glide over the eroded terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude glide over eroded canyon badlands

agents.ego_description: steady wingsuit flight maintaining altitude and speed over the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: The character maintains a steady glide over the canyon badlands during bright daylight. The terrain passes below at high speed, with distant rock formations gradually shifting from the left to the center of the frame as the flight path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: twilight glide with deepening blue hour atmosphere

events.description: ambient sunlight fades significantly as sky transitions from light blue to deep blue hour tones

agents.ego_description: continuing wingsuit flight as ambient light decreases and atmospheric haze increases with the setting sun

entered.detail: distant mountain range with white snow visible on the peaks emerging from the haze

segments.scene_description: As the sun sets, the lighting shifts to blue hour with a deep purple-blue sky. The canyon terrain continues passing below while a distant snow-capped mountain range becomes visible on the horizon, emerging from the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching snow-capped mountain range at blue hour

agents.ego_description: gliding toward the distant snow-covered mountains as visibility decreases in the fading twilight

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character gliding through deep blue hour light toward the snow-capped mountains, which grow larger in the frame. The canyon terrain continues to pass below while the distant rock pinnacles fade from view, replaced by the prominent white-capped mountain range ahead.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 exited 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous glide over a vast desert canyon that transforms from a bright afternoon landscape into a deep blue hour vista. It begins with a parachute deployment and a brief skyward tilt to capture a silhouette against the bright sun before stabilizing into a high-speed forward flight over eroded badlands. As the character maintains a steady glide, the distant rock formations shift across the frame while the daylight gradually fades. The scene then transitions into the blue hour, with the sky shifting to deep purple-blue as a snow-capped mountain range emerges from the atmospheric haze on the horizon. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the dimming light, leaving the canyon pinnacles behind as the prominent white peaks grow larger in the frame.
